TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TITLE: New Trial Lesson Scheduled
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.INTRO: A new student has booked a trial lesson with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.PREPARATION_INTRO: This is your first session together, so it's a great opportunity to make a strong impression. Here are a few suggestions to help you prepare:
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_1_SUFFIX: to understand their level, goals, and interests.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_2: Arrive a few minutes early—you can join the lesson directly from your Home Page or the Lessons tab.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_3: Prepare a short introduction activity to help break the ice and understand their speaking ability.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_4: Ask about their objectives and preferred learning style; this will help guide future lessons.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_5: Be welcoming and supportive—trial sessions often determine whether the student will continue with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.SUPPORT_TEXT: If you have any questions, feel free to contact support at any time.

MSG.LESSON_CREATED_TUTOR: {{studentName}} set up a {{language}} lesson with you for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.LESSON_CREATED_STUDENT: You set up a {{language}} lesson with {{tutorName}} for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.LESSON_CREATED_STUDENT_TRIAL: You set up a {{language}} trial lesson with {{tutorName}} for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.LESSON_CREATED_TRIAL_TIPS: {{studentName}} booked a trial lesson on {{date}} at {{time}}. Check your messages for preparation tips.
MSG.LESSON_CANCELLED_AUTO: Your session scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled. You have not been charged.
MSG.RESCHEDULE_PROPOSED: {{proposerName}} proposed a new time for your lesson for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.RESCHEDULE_ACCEPTED: Your reschedule proposal has been accepted.
MSG.RESCHEDULE_REJECTED: Your reschedule proposal has been declined.
MSG.LESSON_COMPLETED: Your lesson with {{tutorName}} has ended. View your lesson analysis and leave a tip!
MSG.LESSON_ANALYSIS_READY: Your analysis for the lesson with {{tutorName}} is now available.
MSG.CLASS_INVITATION: {{tutorName}} invited you to a {{className}} group class for {{date}} at {{time}}
MSG.CLASS_INVITATION_JOIN: {{tutorName}} invited you to join "{{className}}" on {{date}} from {{startTime}} to {{endTime}}.
MSG.INVITATION_CANCELLED: {{tutorName}} cancelled your invitation to "{{className}}" on {{date}} at {{time}}.
MSG.CLASS_CANCELLED: {{tutorName}} cancelled the class "{{className}}" scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}}. You have not been charged.
MSG.CLASS_AUTO_CANCELLED_TUTOR: Your class "{{className}}" scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been automatically cancelled because the minimum student requirement ({{minStudents}} students) was not met.
MSG.CLASS_AUTO_CANCELLED_STUDENT: The class "{{className}}" with {{tutorName}} scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled due to insufficient enrollment. You have not been charged.
MSG.CLASS_INVITATION_CANCELLED: The class "{{className}}" with {{tutorName}} scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} has been cancelled due to insufficient enrollment.
MSG.TUTOR_NOTE: Your tutor left feedback on your recent lesson
MSG.PAYMENT_EARNED: You earned ${{amount}} for your lesson with {{studentName}} on {{date}}. Funds will be available for withdrawal shortly.
MSG.PAYMENT_PAYPAL: Your payout of ${{amount}} for the lesson on {{date}} has been sent to your PayPal account ({{email}})
MSG.PAYMENT_AVAILABLE: ${{amount}} from {{count}} {{lessonText}} is now available for withdrawal.
MSG.LESSON_REFUNDED: Your lesson with {{tutorName}} has been refunded to your wallet.
MSG.PAYMENT_CANCELLED: Payment for your lesson with {{studentName}} has been cancelled due to investigation findings.
MSG.PARTIAL_REFUND: A partial refund of ${{amount}} has been issued for your lesson with {{tutorName}}.
MSG.PAYMENT_REDUCED: Payment for your lesson with {{studentName}} has been adjusted to ${{amount}} due to investigation findings.
MSG.INVESTIGATION_RESOLVED: The reported issue for your lesson with {{studentName}} has been resolved in your favor. Payment will be released.
MSG.DISPUTE_SUBMITTED: {{tutorName}} has disputed the payment cancellation for their lesson with {{studentName}}.
MSG.TIP_RECEIVED_WITH_FEE: You received a ${{netAmount}} tip from {{studentName}} for your lesson on {{date}}. (${{grossAmount}} tip − ${{fee}} processing fee)
MSG.TIP_RECEIVED: You received a ${{amount}} tip from {{studentName}} for your lesson on {{date}}.
MSG.TIP_SENT: You sent a ${{amount}} tip to {{tutorName}} for your lesson on {{date}}.
MSG.VIDEO_APPROVED_FIRST: Your introduction video has been approved. You can now start tutoring! Your profile will now be discoverable to students. Be sure to add your availability!
MSG.VIDEO_APPROVED: Your introduction video has been approved.
MSG.VIDEO_REJECTED: Your introduction video needs changes. Please review the feedback and resubmit.
MSG.FEEDBACK_REQUIRED: Your lesson with {{studentName}} just ended — leave your feedback while it's fresh!
MSG.FEEDBACK_REMINDER: Your lesson with {{studentName}} has ended. Leave feedback for your student!
MSG.PROGRESS_MILESTONE_FIRST: You've unlocked your Progress Profile after 5 {{language}} lessons! Tap to see your full breakdown.
MSG.PROGRESS_MILESTONE: Milestone {{number}} complete! You've finished {{total}} {{language}} lessons. Tap to see how you've improved.
MSG.CREDENTIAL_REJECTED: Your credential needs review. Please check the details.
MSG.OFFICE_HOURS_BOOKING: A student has booked your office hours session.
MSG.OFFICE_HOURS_STARTING: Your office hours session is starting soon.
MSG.TUTOR_NOTE_SAVED: You provided feedback for {{studentName}} for your lesson on {{date}} at {{time}}.
MSG.PAYOUT_PAUSED: Your payment for your lesson with {{studentName}} is under review. We'll notify you once the review is complete.
